programmes.show_description: Guy Garvey brings you some appropriate music for both Mother's Day and celebrating Ry Cooder's birthday.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Emily Pilbeam presents a mixtape of her personal selection of tracks from BBC Introducing, including a new Track of the Week by Treeboy & Arc.
Chris with the early morning breakfast show.
Comedian John Mulaney chats to Nick about his favourite music and his upcoming stand-up tour.
Lauren welcomes you to a brand new week with uplifting tunes.
Craig is joined by Alison Irvine to chat about her new book 'Barrowland', detailing the history of the legendary Glasgow venue.
Steve is live from Austin, Texas as part of the SXSW Festival with Adult DVD, TTSSFU and Men An Tol joining. Plus, Panic Shack are on the streets of Austin for us.
Nathan and Deb unveil this week's Breaking Artist, singer and cellist Kelsey Lu, following the release of her single Running To Pain. Plus, The Rundown celebrates Irish music.
Marc Riley welcomes Wire head honcho Colin Newman and partner Malka Spigel with their current band Immersion.
1/4. Jacob Alon picks some of their favourite songs that evoke all the different facets of intimacy you can experience on a big night out and after.

programmes.show_name: In Their Own Words: Little Simz
programmes.show_description: 6/6. Highlights of Little Simz's appearances on the BBC, including interviews and sessions.
2/6. Another chance to hear Little Simz from when she took over the airwaves as part of 6 Music's Wise Women Season. Expect cuts from Childish Gambino, Kelis and Fela Kuti.
3/6. Little Simz's best live performances from the BBC Archive as part of her Artist Collection. Including early Radio 1 sessions from 2014 and her appearance at the 6Music Festival 2019.
3/6. A playlist celebrating the music of Little Simz and its roots and branches - including those they've been influenced by and those they've inspired.
Chris with the early morning breakfast show.
Wonderful music to start your day, including the Cloudbusting mix to banish the grey skies.
Lauren gives you the finest blend of fantastic music for your Tuesday morning.
Craig celebrates one of the greatest albums of all time: Thin Lizzy's 'Jailbreak'... With Thin Lizzy guitarist Scott Gorham, artist Jim Fitzpatrick, and Irish band SPRINTS.
Tuesday to Friday every week - live from Cardiff.
Brighton band Lime Garden are live in session from Maida Vale., following the release of their latest single All Bad Parts.
Gideon Coe plays his music loves from every era and genre.
2/4. Tonight's music captures the feeling of when Jacob was a teenager going to the North of Scotland and staying in their best friend's shack, in the town of Rannoch.
